body.title: Anticipation slice 2 — Pursuit adoption emits anticipation onto bus
body.result: Slice 2 shipped (commit pending). pursuits.py spawn pushes Anticipation onto bus + stashes id; evaluate_completion settles + register_outcome with actual_delta (1.0 complete, -0.5 abandon). 8 new tests. Suite 4339 → 4347. Disabled-mode short-circuit; pre-settled defensive path.
body.description:
## Akien pre-approval — THIRD time given (2026-05-03)

CC has flagged this as HIGH-inertia-needs-pre-approval three separate times now. Akien has approved each time. Reading this back: the inertia gate is satisfied; sprint without re-asking. Remove `gate` field; greenlight stands.

---

Slice 2 of T-anticipation-primitive (slice 1 shipped 2026-05-02 commit 6819d2a5 — primitive substrate ready: Anticipation dataclass, Anticipator predict/register_outcome, AnticipationBus push/top_k/settle, module singletons).

**This slice:** when a Pursuit is adopted, emit an Anticipation onto the bus so downstream consumers (action selection, basal_ganglia) can see what Igor 'wants.' Producer-side wiring of slice 1.

**Mechanism:**
```python
from wild_igor.igor.cognition.anticipator import get_anticipator, get_bus

# In pursuit adoption path:
ant = get_anticipator().predict(referent_id=pursuit.id, referent_type='pursuit')
get_bus().push(ant)
# Anticipation handle stored on pursuit so settle() can match on resolution
```

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/pursuits.py (HIGH-inertia per ticket inertia check) + tests/test_pursuits_anticipation_emit.py (NEW).

**Design rules:** docs-in-code; oop-first; HIGH-inertia-pre-approval (pursuits.py).

**Scope boundary:** IN — emit on adoption, store handle, settle on resolution. OUT — action selection reads (slice 3); RPE → milieu (slice 4); RL training of predictor (separate epic).

**Test plan:** unit test that adopting a pursuit increments bus.active_count and the bus.top_k surfaces the new anticipation; resolution test that bus.settle removes the anticipation and register_outcome is called with the actual closure delta.

**Why filed:** slice 1 deliberately stopped short of plug-points because they touch HIGH-inertia files. This ticket carries the explicit pre-approval gate.

**Related:** T-anticipation-primitive (parent, slice 1 shipped); T-anticipation-slice3-action-selection-read (sibling).
